description: Capability for the main window - grants the frontend permission to listen for the "nest-progress" event run_nest_command emits (see commands.rs's run_nest_with_progress), and to use the native multi-file open dialog for DXF import. Custom app commands (import_dxf_command/run_nest_command) don't need an ACL entry - only Tauri's own core/plugin commands (event, dialog, window, etc.) are gated by capabilities.
